hero.title: SAP Solutions
hero.description:
Choose the ideal ERP for your company and get a customized quote

SAP Business One centralizes finances, inventory, production, and sales in a flexible and scalable ERP, supported by a complete ecosystem of payroll, human resources, and legal compliance, driving operational efficiency and business growth. Thousands of companies in over 170 countries trust SAP Business One.

{HeroIcons.lightning}
Heinsohn as SAP Business One Gold Partner in Colombia
{HeroIcons.dollar}
Get a proposal with price and benefits immediately.
{HeroIcons.arrowDown}
Get downloadable content tailored to your business profile.

aiSection.title: <>Artificial intelligence tools<br className="hidden md:block" />in SAP Business One</>

cards.title: Sales order automation
cards.description: direct generation of orders in SAP from Excel files, reducing errors and typing time.

cards.title: Mass billing processing
cards.description: automatic validation of invoices from delivery notes created in SAP and sent to the DIAN.

cards.title: Mass processing of incoming payments
cards.description: automatic creation of payments based on bank files.

cards.title: Intelligent portfolio management
cards.description: use of acceptance and/or rejection events by the receiver to optimize the control and tracking of invoices.

testSection.title: <>Interactive test to choose your <br className="hidden md:block" />SAP ERP software according to your <br className="hidden md:block" />needs</>
testSection.description:
Not all companies need the same type of ERP.
With this quick test, we identify the degree of technological maturity of your company and give you a personalized recommendation.

cards.title: Heinsohn Lite ERP
cards.subTitle: From 1-10 licenses
cards.description: ERP solution specifically designed for small businesses looking to digitize their processes simply and effectively.

cards.title: SAP Business One ERP
cards.subTitle: From 5 licenses
cards.description: Complete SAP ERP that offers advanced functionalities for companies that need greater integration and control.

cards.title: SAP Grow with SAP ERP
cards.subTitle: From 25 licenses
cards.description: The most advanced SAP suite for companies that require maximum power, flexibility, and AI capabilities.

erpComparisonSection.title:
<>Which ERP is better for SMEs,
medium-sized or expanding companies?
erpComparisonSection.description: Real transformations that have revolutionized entire industries through innovative technological solutions.Operating with 20 employees is not the same as with 200.That's why Heinsohn has 3 different ERP solutions for each stage of growth:

cards.title: Heinsohn Lite ERP
cards.description: Ideal for small businesses looking for order and control.

cards.title: SAP Business One ERP
cards.description: Designed for medium-sized companies that want to integrate all their areas.

cards.title: Grow with SAP ERP
cards.description: For growing companies that need cloud, AI, and regional scalability.

dataPorQueSAP.title: <>"Why SAP Business One with <br className="hidden md:block" />Heinsohn?"</>
dataPorQueSAP.description: <>Porque Heinsohn no solo implementa SAP Business One, sino que integra nómina, gestión humana y cumplimiento legal colombiano en un solo ecosistema, con experiencia probada y acompañamiento real. Además de ser Partner Gold de SAP Business One en Colombia, realiza personalizaciones según las necesidades de cada sector y empresa, con equipo propio de desarrollo y actualizaciones constantes basadas en inteligencia artificial. Con más de 1.300 implementaciones que nos respaldan, entregamos un sistema que no compite con el ecosistema de tu empresa, sino que lo optimiza.
